name: Instagram: Profile Recent Posts
description: Open an Instagram profile, progressively scroll the visible grid, and return recent post/reel URLs in reverse-chronological profile order. Use this as the first step of any account-level export: it only discovers candidate URLs, it does not open each post. Pipe the candidates into instagram post-extract (mode=preflight to filter, mode=full to pull assets).

help.summary: Discover recent post and reel URLs on an Instagram profile by scrolling the grid.

parameters.name: handle
parameters.description: Instagram handle without the leading @. Accepts the same casing the URL uses.

parameters.name: target_count
parameters.description: How many candidate post URLs to collect before stopping. Defaults to 36 (roughly the initial grid). Cap is 500.

parameters.name: max_scrolls
parameters.description: Maximum downward scroll passes. Higher values reach older posts at the cost of time. Defaults to 8. Cap is 160.

parameters.name: max_idle_scrolls
parameters.description: Stop early after this many consecutive scrolls that yield no new candidates or page growth. Defaults to 3. Cap is 12.

examples.description: Grab the default 36 recent candidates with 8 scroll passes

examples.command: rzn-browser run instagram profile-recent-posts --param handle="timbersfc" --param target_count="60" --param max_scrolls="30" --param max_idle_scrolls="3"

help.returns: profile_url, profile_title, handle (echoed), links_ready, total_candidates, scroll_passes, idle_scroll_termination, candidates [{post_url, shortcode, kind_hint (p|reel|tv), thumbnail_url, alt_text, indicator_text}].
notes: Requires a Chrome session that can view the target profile. Private accounts without a signed-in session will return an empty candidate list.
Candidates preserve the order they appear in the grid (reverse-chronological for public profiles). Pinned posts can appear first.
Pair with instagram post-extract --param mode="preflight" to filter by date or likes cheaply before running full extraction.
Discovery stops at the smaller of target_count, max_scrolls, or max_idle_scrolls consecutive no-growth passes.
Opens a dedicated workflow tab (use_current_tab=false), so this workflow is safe to run in parallel with other dedicated-tab instagram flows.

browser_automation.description: Opens a dedicated workflow tab so parallel instagram runs do not collide. Reuses the signed-in Chrome profile, progressively scrolls the profile grid, and extracts candidate recent post URLs for later per-post expansion.

sequences.name: instagram_profile_recent_posts
sequences.description: Navigate to one Instagram profile, progressively scroll the grid until enough candidates are gathered or repeated idle passes suggest the page is exhausted.

required_variables.name: target_count
required_variables.description: How many candidate posts to collect before stopping, for example 36

required_variables.name: max_scrolls
required_variables.description: Maximum number of downward scroll passes to attempt, for example 8

required_variables.name: max_idle_scrolls
required_variables.description: How many consecutive no-growth scroll passes to tolerate before stopping, for example 3

steps.name: Allow the profile page to settle
Allow the profile media grid extra time to hydrate
Extract recent post candidates
